jobs.title: Academic Director, BEAM Summer Away
jobs.content: <p><strong>Academic Director, BEAM Summer Away</strong></p><p>BEAM is the US 501(c)(3)-nonprofit math-enrichment program pioneered around rigorous-math-via-summer-program & year-round-pathway STEM-for-underserved-students.</p>

jobs.title: Manager, Donor Engagement & Partnerships (Hybrid - NYC)
jobs.content: <p>Lead BEAM's Donor Engagement & Partnerships function across the BEAM Discovery / Summer Away / Pathway / Year-Round programs.</p>
